title: Open Bugs
main_idea: Bugs to loop through and fix one at a time. we only need to consume these on at a time.
reason: Can't have bugs! Tracking here makes it easy to go through them as they come up. IMPORTANT: When you finish fixing a bug, you MUST remove it from the 'requirements' array in this file as the final step of your work session. Only consume these 1 at a time. Do not litter context with bugs we are not actively looking at.
